content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ UserId'sauthenticitydependsonthe'header:x-user-id'whichcanbecontrolledbyanattacker.
P: strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') → prefer(session_userId)
V: testwithvaliduserIdheaders ∧ verifyunauthorizedaccessdeniedforinvaliduserId
R: ! unauthorizedaccess ∧ ! sessionconfusion ∧ ! potentialdataexposure
A: ensureuserIdisfromtrustedsource ∧ auditheaderusage

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') before merge.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: user_id_retrieval_via_header ⇒ unauthorized_access_if_header_absent
P: validate_user_id_header → ensure_fallback_is_secure
V: test_with_missing_x-user-id ∧ validate_response_code
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! data_breach
A: header_user_id_retrieval_is_unsafe

[AUDIT]
Treat user_id_retrieval_via_header as a trust-boundary issue and apply validate_user_id_header before merge.
